notes: July-September peak window for sperm whales and sei whales. Calmer seas, stable weather. Low crowds vs mainland Europe. Lajes do Pico world-class whale watching. Volcanic landscapes, diving. MAD via LIS.

July is shoulder season for Cape Verde (peak is Nov-Mar for Europeans). Sea turtles nesting on Santa Maria beach (Loggerhead turtles, July-Sept). Kite surfing, diving, genuinely remote Atlantic. Low crowds vs peak winter. Direct flights from MAD/AGP/LPA.

July shoulder season (peak is Nov-Mar for Europeans). Loggerhead sea turtles nesting July-Sept on Santa Maria beach. Kite surfing, diving, genuinely remote Atlantic. Very low crowds vs peak winter. Direct flights from MAD/AGP/LPA.
